name: decompose_issue
description: Assess whether an issue needs decomposition into smaller sub-issues and produce phased work items, each implementable in a single pull request

needs_decomposition.description: True if the issue is too complex for a single PR and should be broken into sub-issues

reason.description: Why decomposition is or is not needed — reference specific scope indicators from the issue

phase.description: Execution order (1-based). Phase 1 must have no dependencies.

body.description: Full issue body: Context section, Acceptance criteria (verifiable from repo state), Key files (paths from file tree), and any relevant conventions. Must be self-contained — the implementing agent will not see the parent issue.

labels.description: Labels to apply from the repo's existing label set

depends_on_phases.description: Phase numbers that must complete before this phase can start. Empty array means no dependencies.

sub_issues.description: Ordered list of sub-issues. Empty when needs_decomposition is false.
